1985.B5.false_variant_should_say: incorrect; correct exponent is -2a, not -a (e.g. for a=1985, e^{-3970} not e^{-1985})

1991.A5.false_variant_should_say: incorrect; the correct maximum is 1/3, attained at y=1

1993.A1.false_variant_should_say: incorrect; the correct value is c = 4/9

1996.B2.false_variant_should_say: incorrect; the direction is reversed in the claim — for n=1 the product is 1, ((2n+1)/e)^((2n+1)/2)=(3/e)^{3/2}~1.91 is the UPPER bound, ((2n-1)/e)^((2n-1)/2)=(1/e)^{1/2}~0.61 is the LOWER bound
